pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 46 and 57 both create events with name='Vendor Evaluation'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh retrieves partner IDs for Alice Johnson and Bob Williams (lines 35-36), then adds them as partner_ids to the good event (line 49). setup_data.py creates these contacts synthetically (lines 40-41) with roles 'Senior Financial Analyst' and 'Sales Director' at northbridge.org.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates two calendar events both named 'Vendor Evaluation' scheduled for 3 days from task start time at 11:00 AM. The valid event (good) includes attendees Alice Johnson (Senior Financial Analyst) and Bob Williams (Sales Director). The duplicate event (bad) has the same name and timing but zero attendees. All data is synthetically generated within the Odoo scheduling environment using dynamically created test contacts.
